# Claude Code prompt — [5A.2] Quote PDF — fix doubled / overlapping repeating header (fix-forward)

*Paste everything below the line into Claude Code. Generated by Cowork, 2026-05-25.*

---

You are working on `GH-Mantova/ProjectOperations`. Read `CLAUDE.md` and follow
it. This is a **fix-forward PR** for roadmap §5A.2 (Quote PDF). PR #222 is
merged, but its repeating-header change is broken on `main` — this PR fixes it.

## The defect (confirmed by visual smoke-test of the merged samples)

PR #222 made the quote header `position: fixed` to repeat it on every page. It
did get a header onto page 4, but the result is a regression — visible in both
`docs/samples/sample-quote-tender-level.pdf` and `sample-quote-with-overlay.pdf`
on current `main`:

1. **The header is doubled.** Near the top of every page the header block
   (IS logo + "INITIAL SERVICES" + licence line + "Quote No.") appears twice.
   The PDF text layer confirms it — the header block is present twice
   consecutively, not a render artifact. Likely cause: the cherry-pick of
   `70b4d98` left **both** the original in-flow header and the new fixed header
   in the builder. Grep the HTML quote builder for a duplicated header
   element / template.

2. **The header overlaps body content.** The fixed header is painted on top of
   body text because the page body reserves no vertical space for it. On page 3
   it strikes through the last line of T&C clause 12; on page 4 it obscures the
   start of clause 13. It is covering contract terms on a client-facing quote.

The acceptance-block change from #222 (`break-inside: avoid`) is fine — leave
it in place, do not touch it.

## What a correct fix looks like

The **footer** already repeats correctly on every page — address line +
"Page X of 4", with no doubling and no overlap. The header should use the
**same mechanism as the footer.**

- **Phase 0** — `git fetch origin`; branch off `main`:
  `fix/quote-pdf-header-overlap`; conflict-check the files you will touch.
- Diagnose how the footer is implemented in the PDF renderer / quote builder
  (most likely Puppeteer's `displayHeaderFooter` + `footerTemplate` + a page
  `margin.bottom`, or an equivalent paged-media technique).
- Implement the repeating header the **same way** — and **remove the broken
  `position: fixed` header and any duplicated header markup** that #222
  introduced. There must be exactly one header definition.
- Ensure the page body reserves vertical space for the header (page
  `margin.top` / content offset equal to the header height) so body content can
  never render underneath it.
- Keep the header content unchanged: IS logo, "INITIAL SERVICES", the licence
  line, and "Quote No. &lt;ref&gt;".

## Regenerate + verify — hard gate

- Regenerate both sample PDFs (the IS-T020 tender-level quote, and the IS-Q001
  `ClientQuote` rendered with overlay), overwriting
  `docs/samples/sample-quote-tender-level.pdf` and
  `docs/samples/sample-quote-with-overlay.pdf`.
- Both must be 4 pages and render without error.
- **Verify programmatically:** extract per-page text for each sample and
  confirm the header block (`INITIAL SERVICES` and `Demolition Licence:
  2328018`) appears **exactly once per page**, on all 4 pages. If it appears
  0× or 2× on any page, the fix is not done — do not open the PR.
- Run the full §6 pre-PR CI checklist; the `api` job must be green.
